result.stdout:
=== Repo Launcher - Help ===

Usage: RepoLauncher [OPTIONS]

Options:
  --help, -h              Show this help message
  --list, -l              List all configured repositories
  --repo, -r <name>       Launch specific repository by name
  --configure-ide         Configure your preferred IDE
  --no-vscode             Skip IDE launch (terminal only)
  --config-path           Show configuration file path
  --open-config           Open configuration file in default editor
  --set-root <path>       Set the root folder for repositories

Examples:
  rl                              # Interactive mode
  rl --repo MyProject             # Launch MyProject directly
  rl --list                       # Show all configured repos
  rl --configure-ide              # Configure preferred IDE
  rl --set-root C:\Projects       # Change root folder
